---
title: "EurOMo 2025, Media Ownership Monitor System"
sort_year: 2025
year: "2025"
status: "Ongoing"
funder: "European Union's LC-03617323 - EurOMO 2025"
categories: [Media & Social Media Monitoring, Ongoing]
---

**Year:** 2025
**Status:** Ongoing
**Funder:** European Union's LC-03617323 — EurOMO 2025
**Research Cluster:** Media & Social Media Monitoring
